mapper.select: SELECT gc.id,gc.goods_id goodsId,gc.score,gc.content,gc.img_list imgList,gc.create_time createTime, su.id buyerInfo_id,su.username buyerInfo_username,su.nickname buyerInfo_nickname,su.avatar buyerInfo_avatar FROM goods_comment gc LEFT JOIN sys_user su ON gc.buyer_id = su.id WHERE gc.goods_id = #{goodsId} ORDER BY gc.create_time DESC
